scripts.test:e2e:deploy-execution: BESA_E2E_STORE_FIXTURE=deploy-execution-store.json node scripts/reset-e2e-store.mjs && CI=1 BESA_E2E_RUNTIME=start BESA_E2E_DEPLOY_STUB=1 BESA_E2E_DEPLOY_STUB_PORT=4022 VERCEL_TOKEN=phase45-local-deploy-token node scripts/run-e2e-with-servers.mjs e2e/deploy-execution.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:deploy-execution:live-smoke: node scripts/assert-live-deploy-execution-e2e-env.mjs && CI=1 BESA_E2E_RUNTIME=start BESA_E2E_DEPLOY_MODE=live node scripts/run-e2e-with-servers.mjs e2e/deploy-execution-live-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:supabase:deploy-execution: node scripts/assert-supabase-deploy-execution-e2e-env.mjs && CI=1 BESA_E2E_MODE=supabase BESA_E2E_DEPLOY_STUB=1 BESA_E2E_DEPLOY_STUB_PORT=4022 node scripts/run-e2e-with-servers.mjs e2e/supabase-deploy-execution-parity.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:provider-live-smoke: node scripts/assert-live-provider-e2e-env.mjs && BESA_E2E_PROVIDER_MODE=live playwright test e2e/live-provider-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:supabase: node scripts/assert-supabase-e2e-env.mjs && BESA_E2E_MODE=supabase playwright test e2e/supabase-parity.spec.ts
scripts.verify:critical: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:e2e
scripts.verify:deploy-execution: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:deploy-execution
scripts.verify:deploy-execution:live-smoke: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:deploy-execution:live-smoke
scripts.verify:deploy-execution:supabase: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:supabase:deploy-execution
scripts.verify:provider-live-smoke: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:provider-live-smoke
scripts.verify:critical:supabase: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:supabase
scripts.verify:provider:supabase: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:supabase:provider
